title: Head of Emiratization Strategy
description: We are seeking a senior strategist to lead Emiratization initiatives for a top-tier holding company, ensuring full MOHRE compliance and developing career pathways for UAE Nationals.
requirements: Minimum 7 years of HR experience in the GCC.
In-depth knowledge of MOHRE regulations and NAFIS initiatives.
Proven track record of successful Emiratization programs.
Fluency in Arabic and English.

title: Senior Legal Consultant (Corporate)
description: A prestigious legal firm is looking for an experienced corporate lawyer to advise enterprise clients on UAE labor laws, corporate restructuring, and commercial contracts.
requirements: Law degree and qualification in a recognized jurisdiction.
5+ years of corporate law experience within the UAE.
Strong understanding of the UAE Commercial Companies Law.
Excellent negotiation and drafting skills.

title: Chief Financial Officer (CFO)
description: Interim CFO required for a rapidly expanding logistics firm. Will oversee financial planning, risk management, and the implementation of UAE Corporate Tax frameworks.
requirements: CPA, ACCA, or equivalent professional qualification.
Extensive experience operating at a C-level within the GCC.
Deep understanding of UAE Corporate Tax laws.
Strong leadership and change management skills.

title: Senior Payroll & Benefits Manager
description: Manage end-to-end payroll operations for an enterprise workforce of 2000+ employees, ensuring WPS compliance and managing complex expat benefit structures.
requirements: Proven experience with UAE Wage Protection System (WPS).
Familiarity with enterprise ERPs (e.g., Oracle, SAP).
High degree of accuracy and confidentiality.
Strong understanding of UAE labor law regarding end-of-service benefits.

title: Lead Software Engineer (FinTech)
description: An innovative fintech startup in the DIFC is looking for a Lead Engineer to scale their payment processing architecture. You will lead a high-performing engineering squad.
requirements: 7+ years of experience with Node.js, Go, or Java.
Strong proficiency in cloud architecture (AWS/Azure).
Experience with financial systems and PCI-DSS compliance.
Previous technical leadership experience.
